title: Nova Work Item v3
description: Single work-item record in the Nova v3 registry. Schema is loose at the top level (forgiving reader — Postel's law) to allow minor schema evolution (v3.x), but evidence sub-fields are strict to protect the DORA evidence contract. See docs/designs/work-item-registry-v3.md §데이터 모델 / §데이터 계약.

schema_version.description: Semver string. major=3 enforced via pattern; minor flexible (forgiving reader). Hard-coded const at write time, validated lazily at read time.

id.description: Primary key. Canonical form: WI-NNNN-slug (4-digit sequential). UUID fallback form: WI-XXXXXXXX-slug (8-hex, when lock acquisition fails). slug allows lowercase ASCII, digits, Korean syllables (가-힣), and hyphens.

title.description: Human-readable title. UTF-8, max 200 chars. Free-text (not a stable contract).

status.description: Lifecycle state. 5-value enum is frozen — never extended (per GPT consensus).

review_required.description: Evaluator gate signal. Set true by /nova:review·check·ux-audit; reset false by Evaluator PASS (atomic with status=done). Invariant: status=done ⟹ review_required=false.

archived_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp recorded when transitioning to superseded. Invariant: status=superseded ⟹ archived_at non-null.

priority.description: Sort key for /nova:next. critical > high > medium > low.

depends_on.description: Other work-item IDs this depends on. Missing IDs raise drift H7 (existence). Cycles raise drift Hard (Sprint 4).

source_docs.description: Repo-relative document paths (plans/designs/specs). Leading slash or ./ prefix prohibited (portability). Missing paths raise drift Warn.

evidence.description: DORA-aligned evidence bundle. commit_sha is the primary key. Strict: no additional sub-fields allowed (additionalProperties:false) to protect the contract — minor evolution requires schema bump.

commit_sha.description: Git SHA values (40-char hex or short form ≥7). Required ≥1 entry when status=done. Empty array allowed for other statuses.

test_output.description: Repo-relative path to test output, or null. Optional.

files_changed.description: Repo-relative file paths from `git diff --name-only`, or null. Optional.

pr_url.description: https URL of the related PR, or null. Schema validates https only; domain (github.com) is enforced by drift rule (Sprint 4).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Auto-set on every write. Must stay in sync with index.json work_items[*].updated_at.

notes.description: Optional free-text. Not a stable contract.

superseded_by.description: When status=superseded, recommended (warn-only if missing). Separate from enum to avoid MADR's collapsed-status pattern.

blocked_reason.description: Required and non-empty when status=blocked. Empty string is a violation.

last_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC. Auto-set when /nova:review or /nova:check PASS. Only status=active items are stale-checked (W4, 30d+).

allOf.title: Invariant: status=done ⟹ review_required=false AND evidence.commit_sha non-empty
Invariant: status=blocked ⟹ blocked_reason non-null and non-empty
